runners.formComment: Won two starts back over 390m at Shepparton. Last start he finished 2nd in a Grade 5 FIN on April 6 over 390m at Shepparton behind Ripped Paige beaten 4.5 lengths (22.14). Draw likely to suit. Form from this box is very strong, including four wins. Hard to beat.

runners.formComment: Finished second last start (23.42) over 410m at Horsham. Has a low draw. Prefer others.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Finished second last start (23.42) over 410m at Horsham. Has a low draw. Prefer others.

runners.formComment: In the money last time at this track (22.15) in a Grade 4/5, finishing a 0.8 lengths second. Goes very well from the draw boasting one victory and three places from seven starts. With a clean break looks hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In the money last time at this track (22.15) in a Grade 4/5, finishing a 0.8 lengths second. Goes very well from the draw boasting one victory and three places from seven starts. With a clean break looks hard to beat.

runners.formComment: Backs up after winning by one length at Healesville (19.26) beating Mepunga Flyer in a Grade 4/5 on April 12 four days ago. Likely to find this a lot tougher and he needs to find another gear.

runners.formComment: Showed strong pace early but found one better when a half a length second over 390m this track in 22.35. This appears within his reach.

runners.formComment: Won two starts back after racing on the pace at Horsham over 410m in 23.49. Followed that up with a minor placing over 410m at Horsham at Grade 5 a week ago. Can't recommend him in this.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked approaching turn into home straight.

runners.formComment: Has finished in the placings at last two, the latest when second (23.30) over 400m at Warragul. Wide draw here. Solid top-three prospects.
